meaning: n.吉兹语,古埃塞俄比亚语v.<美俚>注射(麻醉品)
examples: They only come in when a friend drops dead on the golf course and they think, "Geez, if it could happen to him, …".
Tony: Geez, have you guys never been here before or what?
Even just a PC running iTunes, or geez, at least a measly iPod.
Of course, geez, how nice that FINRA cites to so many federal and state rules and statutes in its proceedings and appeals.
